reads.notes: App-launch/session-bootstrap. As-built reads a single local boolean (SessionStore.loggedIn over shared_preferences, key 'session.loggedIn', default false) to branch context.go(loggedIn ? '/dashboard' : '/welcome') after a 1400ms splash timer. The SessionStore docstring states the real implementation exchanges phone+OTP with the auth API and stores the returned token; the backend need this screen expresses is a session/token-validity check at launch (is there a valid, non-expired access/refresh token?). No entity fields are read from a data list; the only observable is auth state (authenticated vs not).

authContext.notes: Pre-auth routing surface: this screen DETERMINES auth state rather than requiring it. It gates entry to authenticated screens (/dashboard) vs the unauthenticated onboarding funnel (/welcome). No role is read or gated here.

special.notes: Fixed 1400ms Timer before routing; no network call as-built (local flag only).
